description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a youthful appearance, dressed in a school uniform consisting of a short-sleeved shirt, a sleeveless sweater vest, a pleated skirt, and knee-high socks. The figure has a short, straight hairstyle with bangs framing the face, and the facial features are rendered in an anime-inspired style. The arms are extended horizontally to the sides, and the legs are straight and close together, giving a neutral, upright stance. The uniform includes a prominent bow at the collar, and the shoes are simple and flat, suitable for walking. The overall proportions and details suggest a typical urban pedestrian, likely a student or young adult. The surface finish is smooth and matte, with clear, defined edges and minimal surface texture.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in a school uniform with a short hairstyle, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure features anime-inspired facial details and a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, vest, pleated skirt, and knee-high socks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the facial features, bow at the collar, and the full uniform.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the pleated skirt.
attribute_clothing_type: school uniform with short-sleeved shirt, sleeveless sweater vest, pleated skirt, and bow tie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
